title: jasminum sinense
intro: Jasminum sinense, also known as Chinese jasmine or night-blooming jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the olive family (Oleaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Jasminum sinense include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Jasminum sinense is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
